mapper.select: SELECT SOCIAL_ID , USER_ID , PROVIDER , PROVIDER_USER_ID , EMAIL , NAME , PROFILE_IMAGE , CREATED_AT , UPDATED_AT FROM USER_SOCIAL_ACCOUNT WHERE PROVIDER = #{provider} AND PROVIDER_USER_ID = #{providerUserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_SOCIAL_ACCOUNT ( SOCIAL_ID, USER_ID, PROVIDER, PROVIDER_USER_ID, EMAIL, NAME, PROFILE_IMAGE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( USER_SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{email}, #{name}, #{profileImage}, SYSDATE )
